citation.site: Deep Sky West Remote Observatory — Free Image Data Sets (calibrated masters)

use_case.evidence: Free data sets offered for download; published-image credit requirement stated explicitly (owner-relayed 2026-07-09): 'Image Acquisition by the staff at Deep Sky West Remote Observatory (www.DeepSkyWest.com)'.

blockers: Attribution REQUIRED verbatim on any published image using this data
citation.terms: Credit DSW verbatim when data appears in published images; raw+calibration frames are subscriber-only (masters are the free tier).

sources.label: dsw_freesets_PENDING_RESOLVER
sources.note: OneDrive folder migrated to SharePoint (migratedtospo) — keyless API dead, page 403s non-browser clients. BLOCKED pending: owner manual download, browser-session pull, or an SPO anonymous-share resolver in fetch_intake.
